metadata.regulatory_mandate: Factories Act Section 88 / OISD standards evidence preservation
metadata.description: Sealed SCADA telemetry and risk factors recording for safety investigation.

factors.name: Hot Work Operations
factors.details: Active welding, grinding or other hot work. Sparks present. Flammable gases must remain < 4% LFL.

sensor_history.action_required: ROUTINE MONITORING - Standard operating procedures apply. No corrective action needed.

factors.name: CCTV: Unauthorized Zone Entry
factors.details: CCTV Alert: Unauthorized personnel detected in restricted zone 'Coke Oven Battery 1' (91% confidence).

sensor_history.action_required: ROUTINE MONITORING - Standard operating procedures apply. No corrective action needed.

factors.name: Hot Work Operations
factors.details: Active welding, grinding or other hot work. Sparks present. Flammable gases must remain < 4% LFL.

factors.name: CCTV: Unauthorized Zone Entry
factors.details: CCTV Alert: Unauthorized personnel detected in restricted zone 'Coke Oven Battery 1' (88% confidence).

factors.name: Near Miss: Repeated Restricted Area Entry
factors.details: NEAR MISS PREDICTION: Worker repeatedly entering restricted area 'Coke Oven Battery 1' by worker Arjun (2 entries logged). Current shift telemetry is nominal, but system predicts a High Probability of incident within the next shift if patterns continue.

sensor_history.action_required: INCREASE SURVEILLANCE & RE-AUDIT PERMITS - Active anomalies detected. Safety supervisor must inspect site, verify gas ventilation, and review SIMOPs guidelines.

factors.name: Hot Work Operations
factors.details: Active welding, grinding or other hot work. Sparks present. Flammable gases must remain < 4% LFL.

factors.name: CCTV: Unauthorized Zone Entry
factors.details: CCTV Alert: Unauthorized personnel detected in restricted zone 'Coke Oven Battery 1' (92% confidence).

factors.name: Near Miss: Repeated Restricted Area Entry
factors.details: NEAR MISS PREDICTION: Worker repeatedly entering restricted area 'Coke Oven Battery 1' by worker Ravi (3 entries logged). Current shift telemetry is nominal, but system predicts a High Probability of incident within the next shift if patterns continue.

sensor_history.action_required: EVACUATE AREA & HALT PERMITS - Composite risk score is critical. Safety sirens should be activated. Emergency Response Orchestrator must coordinate evacuation.

factors.name: CO Toxicity Risk
factors.details: TOXIC GAS ALARM: Carbon Monoxide level is 28.0 ppm (OSHA PEL: 50 ppm, OISD-137 limits exceeded).

factors.name: CO Rapid Accumulation Anomaly
factors.details: TEMPORAL HAZARD: Carbon Monoxide is rising rapidly at 1.28 ppm/s. Indication of a process gas leak.
